name: flow-team-skill
description: Agent skill package for the Flow (flow.team) Open API — read, act, and proactively suggest across projects, tasks, calendar, members, search, and alarms.
author: Mrbaeksang

scripts.check: node --check setup.mjs && node --check skills/flow-team/scripts/flow.mjs && node --check skills/flow-team/scripts/brief.mjs && node --check skills/flow-team/scripts/report.mjs && node --check skills/flow-team/scripts/schedule-setup.mjs
